title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: Verify that tapping the "Go" button on a paired device's detail modal opens the Poly Contact Support page in a browser.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Support section and open the Device page.
2. Verify that a list of paired devices is displayed.
3. Tap on a device from the list.
4. Observe that a modal appears showing device details (name, product ID, serial number, software version, headset revision, last connected) and a 'Go' button.
6. Observe that the Poly Contact Support page opens in a browser.
expected: A modal with device details and a "Go" button appears. Tapping "Go" opens the Poly Contact Support page in a browser.
